rules.description: Produce the most natural-sounding translation and capture intended meaning for wide Simplified Chinese-speaking audience
rules.notes: Avoid literal transposition of English syntax; balance faithfulness to source and readability in target language

rules.description: Use a clear and precise style that is easily understood and does not read like a translation
rules.notes: Avoid heaviness, ambiguities, repetitions and Anglicism; avoid enriching text excessively

rules.description: Translate buttons as verbs, generally in imperative form; be concise, avoid articles or prepositions
rules.notes: Pay attention to character/space limitations

rules.section: Names of RingCentral Products, Applications and Features
rules.description: Check reference material and linguistic instructions before translating product/application names as many are trademarked
Replace English examples with Simplified Chinese equivalents when needed for localization/adaptation
rules.notes: Especially important for wildcard operators and similar technical examples

rules.description: Be precise, clear, consistent and natural; rephrase unclear sentences and rework sentences that sound like translations
rules.notes: Break up long English sentences into smaller parts for better understanding

rules.description: Use accurate and concise style with no ambiguities or mistranslations
Use clear and coherent style that target reader can understand easily
Use objective style that is neutral; avoid colloquial or slang words; be politically correct
rules.notes: Do not insert your own opinion

rules.description: Use idiomatically correct language with correct verbs, metaphors, expressions so text does not sound like translation
Keep translation complete; do not leave out content (words, phrases, whole paragraphs)
Reference cross-references consistently throughout translation and all files
rules.notes: For external cross-references, check if document has been localized before and match relevant translations

rules.description: Leave external cross-references in source language if document has not been translated before
rules.notes: Contact Project Management team or Language Lead if unable to retrieve translation information

rules.description: Use formal and polite style appropriate for business communication
Give priority to masculine forms unless context specifically requires otherwise
rules.example_correct: 服务团队会联系客户并告知他。
rules.example_incorrect: 服务团队会联系客户并告知他/她。

rules.description: Avoid passive voice when possible; use active form to improve readability
rules.example_correct: 这个主题提供了所有细节。
rules.example_incorrect: 所有细节都在这个主题中提供了。
rules.notes: Passive voice only advised for legal and official documents

rules.description: Do not transfer extensive use of English possessive adjectives to target; simple articles can often replace possessive adjectives
rules.example_correct: 您可以在电脑或移动设备上编辑文件。
rules.example_incorrect: 您可以在您的电脑，或您的移动设备上编辑您的文件。
rules.notes: In some cases, 'our' refers to a subject in third person

rules.description: No need to translate articles into Simplified Chinese for fluency and conciseness
rules.notes: Translate articles only if important to emphasize noun to avoid reader confusion

rules.description: Translate -ing form in different ways based on context (verb, noun, infinitive clause, etc.)
rules.example_correct: 我们的控制器带有一个保护数据完整性的缓存; 这些服务可以协助实施，从初始站点架构到完整服务器场。; 访问此网站，您即同意条款和条件
rules.notes: Use most appropriate option based on context

rules.description: Check context and concentrate on meaning; render as clearly as possible without additional words
rules.example_correct: 您的姓名、电子邮件地址、公司名称; 这意味着现在可以…
rules.example_incorrect: 您的姓名，您的电子邮件地址，您的公司名称; 这意味着您现在可以…

rules.description: Avoid repetitions by using pronouns or other methods, as repetitions are acceptable in English but might not be in Simplified Chinese
rules.example_correct: 要从电脑中删除文件，请在右侧窗格里选择，然后单击"删除"。
rules.example_incorrect: 要从电脑中删除文件，请从右侧窗格中选择该文件，然后单击"删除"。

rules.description: Be careful with false friends and literal translations that can have different meaning from source
Run spell-checker when translation is completed
No space before any punctuation sign in Simplified Chinese
Replace double spaces after full stops with single spaces in Simplified Chinese
Use non-breaking spaces to prevent separation at end of line for names, numbers, software names and versions
rules.notes: Use Ctrl + Shift + Space in MS Word or Alt+0160

rules.description: Separate brand name tags from preceding or following text with a space
Use Chinese comma (，) in both software and document localization
Use pause symbol (、) instead of comma when enumerating several items in Simplified Chinese
Can omit previous comma when translating 'and' (和) or 'or' (或) in Simplified Chinese
When sentence is placed between brackets or quotes, place period outside
Do not use full stops after headings, titles, table columns, or captions unless expression is a full sentence
Do not use full stops if sentence ends with interrogation mark, exclamation mark, ellipsis, or colon
Avoid use of semi-colons; start new sentence instead
rules.notes: Semi-colons used less in Simplified Chinese than English; mainly for separating items in enumeration when commas would be confusing

rules.description: Exclamation marks not as common in Simplified Chinese; sometimes better to remove them
rules.notes: When they appear in groups (!!!), keep only one

rules.description: Never use straight single quote for variables
rules.notes: Updated on 20241207

rules.description: Generally use double quotes in Simplified Chinese; place punctuation outside the quotes
rules.example_correct: 如果希望呼入电话的处理方式在每天所有时间都相同，请选择"24小时"。
rules.example_incorrect: 如果希望呼入电话的处理方式在每天所有时间都相同，请选择"24小时。"
rules.notes: Single quotes should be avoided unless software requirements or technical constraints require them

rules.description: Use straight apostrophe consistently in translations instead of curly apostrophe

rules.section: Style to use in bulleted lists - Example 1
rules.description: If bulleted items are complete sentences (with conjugated verb), each ends with period
rules.example_correct: ● 请输入其他提示名称，然后重新上传。; ● 请输入其他提示名称。
rules.example_incorrect: ● 请输入其他提示名称，然后重新上传; ● 请输入其他提示名称

rules.section: Style to use in bulleted lists - Example 2
rules.description: If bulleted items are phrases or single words, items shall not be followed by period
rules.example_correct: ● 美国; ● 英国; ● 加拿大
rules.example_incorrect: ● 美国，; ● 英国，; ● 加拿大。

rules.section: Style to use in bulleted lists - Example 3
rules.description: If list items are not full sentences and depend syntactically on introductory sentence, each element should end with semicolon
Avoid abbreviations whenever possible; only use commonly used abbreviations, never create new ones
rules.notes: On first use, follow with spelling out or translation in brackets

rules.description: Translation of acronyms depends on RingCentral project-related requirements and should be investigated to confirm localizability
rules.example_correct: CSV（逗号分隔值）; 高性能文件系统 (HPFS)
rules.notes: Follow specific guidelines for different acronym presentation formats

rules.description: If acronym translation is possible, put it in parenthesis after the acronym
rules.notes: When acronym comes before its expansion

rules.description: If acronym translation is not possible, leave expansion in parenthesis
When expansion comes before acronym and translation is possible, keep English acronym
When expansion comes before acronym and translation is not possible, leave both expansion and acronym in parenthesis
When acronym is not followed by expansion, use acronym without expansion
Some acronyms are localizable: AM to 上午, PM to 下午
Write numbers in full when used as nouns, at beginning of sentence, appearing alone representing simple quantities (usually up to 9), and in expressions like 'in the 80s'
Write dates, large numbers, ages, document references as numbers
Replace decimal point with comma and thousand separator with dot
rules.notes: Avoid mixing numerical and alphabetical forms

rules.description: Separate units of measure from preceding number by non-breaking space
For imperial system units, either add converted metric value first with original in brackets, or convert to metric equivalent based on project requirements
rules.notes: Monitor sizes are always expressed in inches as exception

rules.description: Write percentages in figures followed by % symbol with no blank spaces between figure and symbol
Adapt date and time formats to Simplified Chinese standards
rules.notes: Date format should follow month/day pattern

rules.description: Use short date format YYYY/MM/DD separated by hyphen or slash
Use long date format yyyy 年MM 月 dd 日
Use standard time format hh:mm:ss with 24-hour clock format
Place currency symbols behind numeral with two decimal figures
Refer to most updated version of approved RingCentral term list; use trademark symbols only on first mention unless otherwise indicated

rules.section: Third Party Trademarks and Product Names
rules.description: Complete extensive research to determine if official, approved trademarked translated version is available before using as in source
rules.notes: Follow localized equivalence in official websites if available

rules.description: Make sure to receive instructions on whether official and approved translated version of copyright notices is available
rules.notes: Copyright notices tend to be standard texts

rules.description: Query if URLs have local version and modify document accordingly; if not, leave URL as in source English text
If software has been translated, match relevant translation memory or string list provided with translation package
If software has not been translated, use bilingual format with English first, followed by target in brackets
Translate country and city names based on your country/region's conventions
Localize address formats based on your country/region's conventions if necessary
Add international country code to local number for international users when source only includes toll free and US numbers
rules.example_correct: RingCentral，Inc.（贝尔蒙/总部）加州贝尔蒙特戴维斯大道20号94402电话：888-528-(7464) 或+ 1-650-472-4100
